## CreatePerspectiveOptions.archivePayload property

The Perspective archive payload (base-64 encoded plist produced by OmniFocus's built-in export). Reserved for future use once OmniJS exposes a public factory method.

**Signature:**

```typescript
archivePayload: string;
```
